violations.text: The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked (Tuna tartar and beef filet). Establishment is to add indicating symbol notifying the consumer of which foods are offered raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of various ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Bowls were removed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Knives were observed stored between prep unit sandwich flip tops and also between electrical conduit and the wall by the salad prep unit. Utensils between uses shall be maintained in one of the following manners: on a dry clean surface, in water with sufficient flow to flush particulates to the drain, or in water maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or more. Utensils were cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the following units: prep units #1 and 2, and the 1-door low boy freezer by fryolators. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2025
The chemical dispenser located in the ware washing area was observed to be leaking and not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (robocoup) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Employee wash and sanitized robocoup at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023

Working containers of dried ingredients were observed not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Employee labeled containers at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the cook line level (shelving), edge of hood system above grill area and flooring behind dish machine were observed have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Areas need to be cleaned more frequently. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023
